overall.description: A cinematic view of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza at night from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, featuring massive holographic projections of a blue jellyfish and orange goldfish swimming around a circular elevated walkway surrounded by neon-lit skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic elevated plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: holographic orange goldfish begins swimming toward the center of the plaza
holographic blue jellyfish drifts leftward across the frame

agents.ego_description: stationary on elevated balcony, slowly panning clockwise to observe the holographic display and plaza below

entered.detail: large translucent blue holographic creature with flowing tentacles swimming in the air
large glowing orange-red holographic fish with flowing fins and tail
elevated circular walkway with railings, small trees, and ambient lighting
wide staircase leading down to plaza level with blue illuminated edges
tall futuristic buildings covered in bright neon advertisements and glass facades

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a futuristic cyberpunk plaza at night, viewed from an elevated balcony. A massive blue holographic jellyfish floats in the center while an orange holographic goldfish swims on the right. The camera slowly pans clockwise, revealing neon-lit skyscrapers surrounding the circular plaza deck below.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic elevated plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: holographic orange goldfish swims past camera on left side at close range
holographic blue jellyfish moves toward right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan clockwise, watching the holographic creatures circle the plaza

entered.detail: metal safety railing with blue accent lighting on the left foreground

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its slow clockwise pan, the orange holographic goldfish swims past on the left side, appearing very close to the camera. The blue jellyfish drifts toward the right side of the frame. The pedestrian stairs exit view behind the camera angle while the balcony railing enters from the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic elevated plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: holographic orange goldfish completes circuit and returns to right side of frame

agents.ego_description: completing the panoramic observation of the plaza as the holographic creatures continue their circular swimming pattern

entered.detail: modern skyscrapers with reflective glass surfaces on the left side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its rotation, revealing the left side of the plaza with additional glass facade buildings. The orange goldfish completes its circuit around the plaza, returning to the right side, while the blue jellyfish swims back toward the left. The scene returns to a similar composition as the start, with both holographic creatures visible against the neon city backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous clockwise rotation across a futuristic cyberpunk plaza, orbiting a pair of massive holographic creatures amidst a neon-lit skyline. It begins from an elevated balcony, capturing a blue holographic jellyfish and an orange goldfish swimming within a circular plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers. As the camera pans, the orange goldfish glides closely past the left side of the frame while the blue jellyfish drifts toward the right, momentarily bringing the balcony railing into view. The movement then continues to reveal the glass facades of the city's left flank before the holographic creatures complete their circuit. Finally, the rotation returns to its original orientation, framing both the jellyfish and goldfish once more against the glowing backdrop of the city.
